narrative:
Canton township has 8,223 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.7 percentage points.
